creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
> … Only certain types of attachments are allowed on the mailing lists. 
> All attachments with a MIME content type not found in the list below 
> will be stripped before an email is distributed on the mailing lists. …

(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #1)

Both attachments, neither one stripped, are of a type that is not list: 

application/x-shellscript
